overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting an armored character resting at a campfire near a wooden cabin during a stormy night. The camera pans away from the character and moves through a dark, atmospheric forest as lightning flashes in the sky, creating a tense survival-horror atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: campsite with campfire near wooden cabin

agents.ego_description: armored character sitting by the campfire, with camera slowly panning left to reveal the surrounding woods and cabin

entered.detail: burning fire pit with orange flames providing warm light against the dark storm
large horizontal log lying on the ground near the fire
rustic dark wooden structure with a lit window, elevated on stilts
green military-style supply case next to the seated character
tall thin pine trees scattered across the background landscape

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on an armored character resting beside a crackling campfire at night. A rustic wooden cabin stands in the background among sparse pine trees under a stormy sky, with a green supply box visible near the character. The camera slowly pans left, revealing more of the cabin and the surrounding clearing.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooded perimeter around cabin during storm

events.description: bright lightning bolt flashes across the dark stormy sky behind the cabin

agents.ego_description: moving around the cabin's perimeter, passing a marked birch tree as lightning strikes nearby

entered.detail: white-barked birch tree with distinctive red-orange markings on the trunk
tall wooden utility pole with crossbars standing among the trees

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the campfire and approaches the wooden cabin from the side, revealing a birch tree with red markings and a power line pole. A sudden lightning strike illuminates the storm clouds as the character navigates around the cabin's exterior into the treeline, leaving the campfire behind.

agents.ego_description: navigating deeper into the dark woods away from the cabin, moving through dense undergrowth

entered.detail: thick bushes and low vegetation covering the forest floor
gnarled and leaning tree trunks creating an ominous forest atmosphere

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the dense forest, the cabin and marked trees disappear from view behind thick vegetation. The path winds through tightly packed pine trees and twisted trunks with minimal sky visibility, creating an enclosed, ominous atmosphere as the storm continues to rage overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the flickering warmth of a campsite into the oppressive darkness of a storm-lashed forest. It begins by panning away from an armored character resting beside a crackling campfire and a rustic wooden cabin under a turbulent night sky. As the camera moves past the fire, it glides toward the side of the cabin, passing a marked birch tree and a power line pole just as a sudden flash of lightning illuminates the heavy clouds. The scene then shifts away from the clearing and pushes deeper into the treeline, where the cabin and open space vanish behind thick vegetation. Finally, the camera winds through a dense thicket of tightly packed pine trees and twisted trunks, leaving the light behind for an enclosed and ominous atmosphere.
